description_long: This is a medium-sized, octagonal wooden barrel or bucket with a pronounced wood grain texture and a warm brown coloration. The vessel is reinforced at the top and bottom with thick, metallic gray bands that provide structural support and a visual accent. The interior is partially filled with clear water, visible from the open top, suggesting it is used for holding liquids. The wood staves are vertically aligned and slightly beveled, giving the object a robust, hand-crafted appearance. There are no visible handles or lids, and the surface finish is matte with a subtle sheen on the metal bands. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for outdoor or rustic urban environments.
description: A wooden, octagonal barrel or bucket with metallic gray reinforcement bands and visible water inside. The object has a rustic, utilitarian look with no handles or lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, water inside, and prominent wood grain with metallic bands.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the beveled wood staves and the continuous metal banding.
description_view_2: Side view with a clear look at the wood texture and the seamless integration of the metal bands.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the uninterrupted wood surface and the open top with water visible.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
